questionHtml:
Which compound is both volatile and soluble in water?


A.  NaCl

B.  CH3CH2CH3

C.  CH3OH

D.  C12H22O11

meta.title: Which compound is both volatile and soluble in water? A. NaCl B. CH3CH2CH3 C. CH3OH D. C12H22O11
